recommendations.name: Gitea PR review skill
recommendations.purpose: Review Gitea pull requests, post actionable findings, and apply configured review labels.
recommendations.validation: Test-Path .\.codex\skills\dev-flow-pr-review-agent\SKILL.md
searchQueries: site:docs.gitea.com Gitea pull request reviews API
recommendations.notes: Copy from the repository skill source; do not install by command.

recommendations.name: Browser E2E QA plugin
recommendations.purpose: Open local or deployed web targets, inspect pages, capture screenshots, and verify user-facing QA flows.
recommendations.source: manual:Codex Browser plugin or equivalent local browser automation configuration
recommendations.validation: Open the target site in the in-app browser and capture a smoke-test screenshot.
searchQueries: site:playwright.dev/docs Playwright best practices user visible assertions
recommendations.notes: Guarded IDE plugin configuration only; do not write secrets or install plugins without explicit confirmation.
recommendations.importantMessage: Restart the IDE/Codex app once after all accepted plugins, MCPs, or IDE extensions are configured so the Browser tool is active.

recommendations.name: Microsoft Learn MCP
recommendations.purpose: Use official Microsoft Learn documentation lookup for .NET, ASP.NET Core, Azure, Bicep, and deployment guidance.
recommendations.validation: After Codex restart, verify a Microsoft Learn MCP tool is listed by tool search or available MCP tools.
recommendations.notes: Guarded MCP configuration only. Do not write tokens to tracked files.
recommendations.importantMessage: Restart Codex once after all accepted MCPs are configured so Microsoft Learn MCP tools are discovered.

recommendations.name: Playwright MCP
recommendations.purpose: Use browser automation MCP support for live UI checks, screenshots, responsive validation, and E2E evidence.
recommendations.target: Codex MCP configuration or active mcp__playwright tools
recommendations.validation: Use tool_search for Playwright MCP or confirm mcp__playwright tools are available in the current Codex session.
recommendations.notes: Use active MCP tools when exposed by Codex; otherwise prepare guarded Codex MCP configuration.

recommendations.name: Azure MCP Server
recommendations.purpose: Use official Azure MCP guidance for Azure resource inspection and deployment troubleshooting when local credentials are configured.
recommendations.validation: After Codex restart, verify an Azure MCP tool is listed by tool search or available MCP tools; then run a read-only Azure resource query.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com azure developer azure mcp server
recommendations.notes: Azure auth stays local and must not be written to tracked files.
recommendations.importantMessage: Restart Codex once after all accepted MCPs are configured so Azure MCP tools are discovered.

recommendations.name: Bicep MCP Server
recommendations.purpose: Use official Bicep MCP support for Bicep/IaC authoring, validation, and resource-schema guidance.
recommendations.validation: After Codex restart, verify a Bicep MCP tool is listed by tool search or available MCP tools; also run az bicep version.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com azure resource manager bicep mcp
recommendations.notes: Guarded MCP configuration only. Validate local Bicep support with Azure CLI.
recommendations.importantMessage: Restart Codex once after all accepted MCPs are configured so Bicep MCP tools are discovered.

recommendations.name: Docker MCP Toolkit
recommendations.purpose: Use Docker MCP Toolkit/catalog support when container tooling needs MCP-backed Docker workflows.
recommendations.target: Docker Desktop or compatible Docker MCP Toolkit configuration
recommendations.validation: Run docker version; then verify Docker MCP Toolkit is enabled in the Docker MCP catalog/toolkit UI or exposed to Codex as an MCP server.
searchQueries: site:docs.docker.com MCP Catalog Toolkit get started
recommendations.notes: External app configuration only; do not run arbitrary installer snippets from discovery sources.
recommendations.importantMessage: After Docker MCP Toolkit is enabled externally, restart Codex once so new MCP tools are discovered.

recommendations.name: .NET SDK Docker toolchain
recommendations.purpose: Use the repo-owned CI image for repeated .NET restore, format, build, test, coverage, packaging, and deployment helper runs instead of installing the SDK/tooling during every workflow.
recommendations.validation: .\.codex\skills\configure-dev-environment\scripts\configure_infra_tools.ps1 -Mode ValidateGiteaActionsRunner
recommendations.notes: Build the pinned repo image once with BuildGiteaActionsImages; do not install SDK/tools during every job.

dockerAlternative.limits: Requires a usable local Docker daemon and the repo-owned pinned image.

recommendations.name: Gitleaks Docker scanner
recommendations.purpose: Run repeated secret scans from the repo-owned CI image instead of installing Gitleaks on every host or job.
recommendations.validation: .\.codex\skills\configure-dev-environment\scripts\configure_infra_tools.ps1 -Mode ValidateGiteaActionsRunner
recommendations.notes: Use the pinned repo CI image that already contains Gitleaks; external image is discovery metadata only.

dockerAlternative.limits: Requires a usable local Docker daemon and the repo-owned pinned image.

recommendations.name: Trivy Docker scanner
recommendations.purpose: Run repeated dependency/container scans from the repo-owned CI image instead of reinstalling Trivy during every workflow.
recommendations.validation: .\.codex\skills\configure-dev-environment\scripts\configure_infra_tools.ps1 -Mode ValidateGiteaActionsRunner
recommendations.notes: Use the pinned repo CI image and refresh the Trivy database cache before scans when stale.

dockerAlternative.limits: Requires a usable local Docker daemon and the repo-owned pinned image.

recommendations.name: Playwright Docker E2E runtime
recommendations.purpose: Run repeated browser E2E diagnostics from the pinned Playwright image instead of installing browsers on the host.
recommendations.validation: npm run test:docker:list --prefix tests/SDDTemplate.E2ETests
recommendations.notes: Use npm run test:docker so the pinned repo E2E image supplies browsers and system dependencies.

dockerAlternative.limits: Requires Docker and the pinned E2E image; local runs are diagnostics, not official QA evidence.

recommendations.name: Playwright frontend testing skill
recommendations.purpose: Run focused browser checks for layout, interaction, console errors, responsive behavior, traces, and screenshots.
recommendations.validation: Test-Path .\.codex\skills\quality-frontend-testing-debugging\SKILL.md
recommendations.notes: Copy from the repository skill source; do not install by command.

recommendations.name: Playwright interactive skill
recommendations.purpose: Use persistent Playwright sessions for local UI iteration, visual QA, viewport-fit checks, and deployed browser failure diagnosis without replacing committed E2E tests.
recommendations.validation: Test-Path .\.codex\skills\playwright-interactive\SKILL.md
recommendations.notes: Repo-local external skill only. It supports implementation/debugging and QA failure classification; quality-test-e2e remains the official QA gate.

recommendations.name: .NET 10 platform guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep SDK, target framework, CLI, and ASP.NET Core guidance aligned with the .NET 10 stack.
recommendations.validation: Confirm docs/development.md and openspec/config.yaml mention .NET 10 and official-first Microsoft guidance.
recommendations.notes: Use for research and docs alignment; no tool installation is implied.

recommendations.name: Blazor application practices guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide Blazor-specific UI, routing, component, and test decisions using official ASP.NET Core documentation.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Blazor stack intent remains documented in docs/development.md and OpenSpec context.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com aspnet core Blazor components routing .NET 10
recommendations.notes: Prefer generated framework conventions over hand-crafted framework plumbing.

recommendations.name: Modern .NET architecture guidance
recommendations.purpose: Use official Microsoft architecture guidance for clean boundaries, simple layering, and maintainable ASP.NET Core application structure.
recommendations.validation: Confirm docs/development.md describes code-practice defaults without over-prescribing architecture.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com modern web applications ASP.NET Core Azure architecture
recommendations.notes: Apply proportionally to this repo's size; avoid broad refactors unless a ticket requires them.

recommendations.name: Clean code practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide small, readable, testable code changes with clear names, focused responsibilities, low surprise, and proportional refactoring.
recommendations.validation: Confirm implementation and review guidance prefer simple focused changes, meaningful names, and tests over broad speculative refactors.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com C# coding conventions clean code
recommendations.notes: Use as a general engineering standard; no tool installation is implied.

recommendations.name: REST API design practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide HTTP semantics, route shape, validation, ProblemDetails responses, OpenAPI metadata, and integration-test expectations.
recommendations.validation: Confirm API work records observable behavior and tests status codes, payload shape, validation errors, and auth boundaries.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com ASP.NET Core Web API ProblemDetails
site:learn.microsoft.com ASP.NET Core OpenAPI integration tests
recommendations.notes: Pair with dotnet-webapi when that skill exists locally.

recommendations.name: QA automation practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide unit, integration, coverage, browser-visible QA, evidence capture, and failure triage expectations.
recommendations.validation: Confirm QA guidance includes focused assertions, coverage threshold checks, browser evidence when configured, and actionable failure reports.
searchQueries: site:playwright.dev/docs Playwright best practices assertions traces
recommendations.notes: Use with assertion-quality and Playwright skills when present.

recommendations.name: Security review standard guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide secure-by-default reviews for secrets, auth, authorization, input validation, dependency risk, logging, and OWASP risks.
recommendations.validation: Confirm security-sensitive work checks secrets, auth boundaries, validation, dependency scan output, and logging safety.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com ASP.NET Core security authentication authorization
recommendations.notes: Pair with security-best-practices when that skill exists locally.

recommendations.name: PR review practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide review findings toward behavioral bugs, missing tests, security risks, CI drift, and actionable comments.
recommendations.validation: Confirm PR reviews prioritize correctness, tests, security, deployment risk, and current-head labels before handoff.
searchQueries: site:docs.gitea.com Gitea pull request review comments API
recommendations.notes: Use with dev-flow-pr-review-agent and review-feedback workflow skills.

recommendations.name: Rancher Desktop local deployment guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep the selected local deployment lane aligned with Rancher Desktop Kubernetes behavior, context selection, image runtime, and operator validation.
recommendations.validation: Confirm docs and configure checks use the selected rancher-desktop Kubernetes context and do not route local deployment through optional Azure guidance.
recommendations.notes: Use because .codex/project-profile.json selects rancher-desktop as the deployment provider; Azure App Service remains optional and should not be suggested for the default lane.

recommendations.name: Kubernetes workload guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide Deployment, Service, health, rollout, namespace, and manifest changes for the Rancher Desktop local lab.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Rancher Desktop manifests and deployment scripts keep workloads, services, health checks, and rollouts explicit and verifiable.
searchQueries: site:kubernetes.io/docs Kubernetes Deployment Service rollout status
recommendations.notes: Use for local-lab Kubernetes manifests and deployment scripts; do not imply a host-level Kubernetes installer.

recommendations.name: Seq Serilog observability guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep structured application log capture, Seq search, alerting, and evidence rules aligned with the selected local observability lane.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Seq setup and evidence guidance use structured Serilog events without secrets or raw pod logs in durable evidence.
recommendations.notes: Use for direct Rancher Desktop app log search and alert guidance; keep credentials and noisy pod logs out of durable evidence.

recommendations.name: Release practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide build-once artifact promotion, release manifest integrity, environment evidence, tag consistency, and explicit PROD promotion.
recommendations.validation: Confirm DEV, QA, and PROD use the same Nexus ZIP artifact and release.json lineage without rebuilding.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com Azure App Service zip deploy
site:help.sonatype.com Nexus Repository REST API raw hosted
recommendations.notes: Use for deploy and PROD promotion decisions; credentials remain local-only.

recommendations.name: Rollback practice guidance
recommendations.purpose: Guide production rollback to a known-good immutable artifact without rebuilding or rewriting main.
recommendations.validation: Confirm rollback chooses a verified Nexus artifact, preserves release lineage, verifies PROD health, and records follow-up ownership.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com Azure App Service zip deploy rollback
site:help.sonatype.com Nexus Repository REST API raw hosted checksum
recommendations.notes: Use rollback before hotfix when a known-good artifact exists.

recommendations.name: Gitea Actions and API guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep Gitea PR, Actions, runner, token, and status-check behavior aligned with official Gitea documentation.
recommendations.validation: Confirm configure references and PR workflow docs use current Gitea Actions/API terminology.
searchQueries: site:docs.gitea.com Gitea API pull requests reviews
recommendations.notes: Use Gitea API through configured local client tools; do not read secrets from containers.

recommendations.name: Nexus artifact API guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep artifact upload, checksum, manifest, and QA evidence publication behavior aligned with Nexus Repository guidance.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Nexus references preserve app/{commitSha}/ artifact identity and release.json handling.
searchQueries: site:help.sonatype.com Nexus Repository REST API raw hosted upload checksum
recommendations.notes: Nexus is mandatory for DEV, QA, PROD, and rollback artifact lineage.

recommendations.name: Azure App Service ZIP deploy guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep App Service ZIP deployment guidance aligned with the current Azure deployment surface.
recommendations.validation: Confirm deployment docs and workflows continue to deploy the existing Nexus ZIP without rebuilding.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com Azure App Service deploy zip az webapp deploy
recommendations.notes: Use for deployment guidance only; Azure credentials remain user-supplied secrets.

recommendations.name: Azure Monitor Log Analytics guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep Azure Monitor logs, Log Analytics workspace, RBAC, and Grafana datasource guidance aligned with official documentation.
recommendations.validation: Confirm App Service diagnostics target Log Analytics and Grafana datasource provisioning uses ignored service-principal values.
searchQueries: site:learn.microsoft.com Azure Monitor Logs Log Analytics App Service diagnostic settings
recommendations.notes: Do not write Grafana Azure service-principal secrets into tracked files.

recommendations.name: Grafana provisioning guidance
recommendations.purpose: Keep datasource and dashboard provisioning aligned with Grafana's file-provisioning behavior.
recommendations.validation: Confirm Grafana provisioning files remain tracked templates without secret-bearing values.
searchQueries: site:grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest provisioning datasources dashboards Azure Monitor
recommendations.notes: Provisioned dashboard JSON should visualize Azure Monitor data without embedding credentials.

notRecommended.name: OpenProject MCP
notRecommended.reason: OpenProject MCP is intentionally not recommended for this delivery flow; repo-local skills must use the configured OpenProject API and never OpenProject MCP, containers, or direct databases for ticket delivery.
